records.requires: protected signing identity, production environment reviewer, immutable subject attestation and promotion record
deployed current and previous compatible artifacts plus timed protected rollback
provider telemetry backend, paging route, synthetic failure injection and screenshots or exports
authorized independent tester, deployed representative scope and finding disposition
provider secret authorities, old and new scoped credentials, revocation and audit records
isolated D1/R2 resources, encrypted provider backup, exact object manifests and timed restore
dual-control key custody authority and recovery receipt without exporting private material
Cloudflare account, numeric cost approval, synthetic namespace, managed binding and native fallback capacity
approved launch load, provider quotas/rates/invoice data and representative native runners
approved residency topology, isolated regional target, acknowledged-write replay and traffic control
protected contact registry, acknowledgement path and human responders
macOS and Windows signing/notarization authorities and representative clean machines
